junit/src/main/java/com/telusko/learning.general_idea: Added a new method to compute the area of a circle.
junit/src/main/java/com/telusko/learning.after: public double computeCircleArea(double radius){ return Math.PI * Math.pow(radius,2); }

junit/src/test/java/com/telusko/learning.general_idea: Refactor flat test class into nested test classes to group tests by feature (Square vs Circle).
junit/src/test/java/com/telusko/learning.after: class ShapesTest { @Nested class ComputeSquareAreaTests { @Test void shouldReturnCorrectResultWhenProvidedValueIsCorrect() { ... } } @Nested class ComputeCircleAreaTests { ... } }

junit/src/test/java/com/telusko/learning.general_idea: Add @TestInstance(PER_CLASS) to allow instance fields and constructor initialization for the test class.
Move object instantiation from individual tests to the class constructor to initialize once per class lifecycle.
junit/src/test/java/com/telusko/learning.after: Shapes s; ShapesTest() { s = new Shapes(); ... }

junit/src/test/java/com/telusko/learning.general_idea: Add @AfterAll static method to execute cleanup or logging after all tests in the class finish.
junit/src/test/java/com/telusko/learning.after: @AfterAll static void finish() { System.out.println("Finished all tests!"); }
